reason:
Agent was unable to retrieve GitHub username due to invalid OAuth token returning 401 Bad credentials
  Bugs found:
    - GitHub OAuth token is invalid - Agent attempted to retrieve GitHub username but the connected GitHub account's OAuth token is not being accepted by GitHub. The proxy returned "401 Bad credentials" for every GitHub API request (including public endpoints like /user), indicating the token either expired or was revoked. Expected behavior: Agent should successfully retrieve and display the GitHub username. Actual behavior: Agent returned error message stating it cannot determine the GitHub username due to authentication failure.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded the Super Agent application with sidebar visible
Found agent "QA-20260509-010650-xzf9" in sidebar and clicked it - Agent detail page loaded successfully, showing agent name and status
Verified agent status is "idle" - Status indicator showed "idle", which satisfies the requirement (running or idle)
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message successfully entered in input field and sent, agent transitioned to "working" status
A connected account request card appeared asking "Allow access to GitHub to look up the authenticated user's username?" - Card displayed with GitHub account already selected/checked
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button - Access granted, agent status changed to "working"
A second request card appeared asking to allow GitHub GET /user API call - Card displayed with permission options
Selected "Always allow read:user" permission - Permission granted, agent resumed processing
Waited up to 4 minutes for response - Agent completed work after 1m 45s (shown in "Worked for 1m 45s" timestamp)

Verified response includes GitHub username - FAILED: Response does not include a GitHub username. Instead, agent returned error message: "I can't determine your GitHub username — the connected GitHub account's proxy is returning 401 Bad credentials for every request (including public endpoints), which means the OAuth token isn't being accepted by GitHub." Agent attempted multiple troubleshooting approaches but all failed due to the invalid token.
bugs: GitHub OAuth token is invalid - Agent attempted to retrieve GitHub username but the connected GitHub account's OAuth token is not being accepted by GitHub. The proxy returned "401 Bad credentials" for every GitHub API request (including public endpoints like /user), indicating the token either expired or was revoked. Expected behavior: Agent should successfully retrieve and display the GitHub username. Actual behavior: Agent returned error message stating it cannot determine the GitHub username due to authentication failure.
